zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Edward Osborne於1538年出生在英國英格蘭肯特阿福德時，他的父親Sir Richard Osborne25歲，母親Jane Broughton23歲。他於從1562年1月11日到1563年1月10日與Lady Anne Hewett在英國倫敦結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1592年2月4日在英國倫敦享年54歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭倫敦聖 迪奧尼斯 巴其。

nameMeanings.name: Osborne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Osbern, partly from late Old English Ōsbern, an Anglicized form of Old Norse Ásbiǫrn (from áss ‘god’ + biǫrn ‘bear’), but more usually from Norman use of the cognate ancient Germanic Ōsbern. Osbern was often treated as an alternative form of Osbert. For pet forms see Hoskin and Opie . The surname has also been established in Ireland (Waterford, Tipperary) since the mid 16th century.

variants.name: Oborne
meanings: habitational name from Oborne in Dorset. The placename derives from Old English wōh ‘twisted, crooked’ + burna ‘spring, stream’.
possibly from the Middle English personal name Obern, an Anglo-Norman French form of Osbern (see Osborne ).

variants.name: Hoskin
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Osekin with prosthetic H-, a pet form of Anglo-Norman French names beginning with Os- (particularly Osbert, as well as Osbern, and Osmund) + the Flemish diminutive suffix -kin. All three personal names were current in medieval Cornwall or Devon; see Osborne , Osmond , and Opie (a pet form of Osbert). Old English Ōsbeorn, Ōsbeohrt, and Ōsmund may also have contributed in a minor way to Middle English usage; Middle English Oswald is another possible source, but the name was very rare in the late 14th century. For the excrescent initial H-, compare Herrick .

variants.name: Oborn
meanings: English (Somerset): habitational name chiefly from Oborne in Dorset, or perhaps occasionally from Howbourne Farm in Hadlow Down, Sussex, Woburn in Bedfordshire, Woburn Park in Surrey, or Wooburn in Buckinghamshire. The placenames derive from Old English wōh ‘twisted, crooked’ + burna ‘spring, stream’, except Wooburn in Buckinghamshire, which is of uncertain etymology.
English (of Norman origin): perhaps from the Middle English personal name Obern, an Anglo-Norman French form of Osbern (see Osborne ).

nameMeanings.name: Edward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Edward Osborne was born in 1538, in Ashford, Kent, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Richard Osborne, was 25 and his mother, Jane Broughton, was 23. He married Lady Anne Hewett from 11 January 1562 to 10 January 1563, in London, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 4 February 1592, in London, England, at the age of 54, and was buried in St Dionis Backchurch, London, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Edward Osborne est né en 1538, à Ashford, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Richard Osborne, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Jane Broughton, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Lady Anne Hewett du 11 janvier 1562 au 10 janvier 1563, à Londres, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 4 février 1592, à Londres, Angleterre, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterré à St Dionis Backchurch, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Edward Osborne 1538 in Ashford, Kent, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Richard Osborne 25 und seine Mutter Jane Broughton 23. Er hat von 11. Januar 1562 bis 10. Januar 1563 in London, England Lady Anne Hewett geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 4. Februar 1592 im Alter von 54 Jahren in London, England und wurde in St Dionis Backchurch, London, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Edward Osborne è nato il nel 1538 nel Ashford, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Richard Osborne, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Jane Broughton, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Lady Anne Hewett da 11 gennaio 1562 a 10 gennaio 1563, nel London, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 4 febbraio 1592, nel London, England, all'età di 54 anni, e fu sepolto a St Dionis Backchurch, London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Edward Osborneが1538年にイギリスイギリスケントアシュフォードで生まれた時，父Sir Richard Osborneは25歳，母Jane Broughtonは23歳であった。から1562年1月11日まで1563年1月10日にイギリスロンドンでLady Anne Hewettと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1592年2月4日にイギリスロンドンで54歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスロンドンスト ディオニス バクチャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Edward Osborne(이)가 1538년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 애스h퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Richard Osborne(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Jane Broughton(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1562년 1월 11일부터 1563년 1월 10일까지 영국 런던에서 Lady Anne Hewett(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1592년 2월 4일 영국 런던에서 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 런던 스트 디오니스 백c후르치에 묻혔다.

pt.1562: de 11 de janeiro de 1562 a 10 de janeiro de 1563
pt.Saint Dionis Backchurch,London,London,En: St Dionis Backchurch, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.St. Martins, Ogars, London, England: St Martin in the Bull Ring Church, Birmingham, Warwickshire, Inglaterra
pt.St Dionis Backchurch, London, England, U: St Dionis Backchurch, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Edward Osborne nasceu em 1538, em Ashford, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Richard Osborne, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Jane Broughton, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Anne Hewett de 11 de janeiro de 1562 a 10 de janeiro de 1563, em London, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 4 de fevereiro de 1592, em London, Inglaterra, com 54 anos, e foi sepultado em St Dionis Backchurch, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.St Dionis Backchurch, London, England, U: ст дионис баккчурч, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Edward Osborne родился в 1538 г. в местности ашфорд, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Richard Osborne было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Jane Broughton, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Anne Hewett с 11 января 1562 по 10 января 1563 в местности Лондон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 4 февраля 1592 г. в местности Лондон, Англия в возрасте 54 лет и был похоронен в местности ст дионис баккчурч, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Edward Osborne nació en 1538, en Ashford, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Richard Osborne, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Jane Broughton, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Lady Anne Hewett desde 11 de enero de 1562 hasta 10 de enero de 1563, en London, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 4 de febrero de 1592, en London, Inglaterra, a la edad de 54 años, y fue sepultado en St Dionis Backchurch, London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
